title: Nicole Hunter
compiled_truth: Nicole Hunter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-03 to 2001-12-06), Nicole Hunter sent 14 and received 127 emails, totalling 141 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (14), [Tom Moran](people/tom-moran) (6), [Aparna Rajaram](people/aparna-rajaram) (4), [Gary Nelson](people/gary-nelson) (4), [Karen Lambert](people/karen-lambert) (3).
